response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise, but his background leans heavily toward senior-level roles with complex systems rather than junior/mid-level development. His work in renewable energy/construction tech is unclear, though his GISCollective project shows domain-relevant skills like data integration and user-facing platforms. The high on-site requirement may also pose a challenge given his international work history.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple roles
Proven ability to ship scalable solutions (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz pricing automation)
Experience with React, Node.js, and databases (PostgreSQL-like SQL, MongoDB)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; may seek higher compensation or responsibility
Limited direct experience in renewable energy/construction tech or CRM integrations
Work environment mismatch: prefers flexible/remote roles over high on-site presence
